Registry / Terms / intermittent automatic checking facility (type I)

intermittent automatic checking facility (type I)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01039 · 21 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 11 distinct definitions — harmonise.
